contract_scope.name: content_distribution_contract
contract_scope.rule: This contract defines how content is published, gated, and distributed using access entitlements without mutating subscription or payment state.

purpose: Control content publication, visibility, and access resolution based on derived access entitlements.

core_invariant.rule: Content visibility must always be consistent with access entitlements and declared visibility policies.

CreatorContent.description: Logical content unit created by a creator
rules: Content may only be visible after publication
Archived content must not appear in feeds
Draft content is never externally visible

ContentAsset.description: Media or payload associated with content
rules: Assets must not embed access rules
Assets inherit visibility from parent content

VisibilityPolicy.description: Defines who may view a piece of content
rules: Visibility policies must be evaluated deterministically
Policy changes must not rewrite historical access decisions

TierGateRule.description: Defines tier-based access requirements for content
rules: Tier gates consume access entitlements only
Tier evaluation must not query subscription state directly
Access resolution must be deterministic
Access checks must not mutate state
Access resolution must be batchable

content_projection.purpose: Provide fast, read-optimized views of accessible content
rules: Projections are derived and rebuildable
Projections must be invalidated on entitlement changes
Projection rebuilds must be replay-safe
Content visibility at time T must be explainable
Historical access decisions must be auditable
Backfilled access for new supporters must follow declared policies
Visibility violations must emit alerts
Ambiguous access must default to deny
Human review is required for manual overrides

replay_behavior: External delivery must not be re-triggered
safety_rules: Replay must never expose restricted content
